commands.review_summary:
The PR changes generated-media completion delivery so image/music/video completions with expected media URLs attempt an idempotent direct send before requester-agent/message-tool handoff, with focused completion-delivery tests.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +57. Total +74 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction shape: current main can still route generated-media completion through a requester message_tool_only run, and agent-core executes all tool calls in a batch before honoring terminate. I did not run a live Discord reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied real channel proof and maintainer review of the direct-first delivery choice; there is no narrow automated code repair identified.

target.title: [codex] fix image completion duplicate sends
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes generated-media completion delivery so successful `image_generate` / `music_generate` / `video_generate` completions with expected media URLs are delivered directly and idempotently before waking the requester agent.

## Root Cause

The completion path already had deterministic generated-media direct delivery, but only as a fallback after the requester-agent/message-tool handoff. That left successful media completions dependent on prompt obedience: the requester agent was told to call `message.send` once, then remain silent. If the completion session context already contained repeated historical `message` tool calls, the model could copy that pattern and send the same media attachment multiple times.

## Changes

- Prefer direct generated-media delivery when expected media URLs are present.
- Keep the previous requester-agent/message-tool path as fallback when direct delivery fails.
- Update completion-delivery tests for direct-first media delivery, active requester sessions, legacy group routes, topic thread IDs, and fallback behavior.

Closes #87989.

## Validation

- `OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts` (152 passed)
- `git diff --check`
